summary: Iteration 62: Quantum Coherence Dashboard Widget, Expanded Meditations (5 total), Scheduled Reminders with time preferences, and Quantum language across pages. All 22 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend features verified: Dashboard shows Quantum Coherence Widget with score ring, state label, breakdown badges. VR page shows Quantum Field portal. Meditation/Breathing/Teachings pages show quantum-enriched descriptions.

issues: Morning/Evening time pickers only visible when notifications are enabled (requires browser permission). This is expected behavior but may confuse users who want to set times before enabling.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 62 complete. New features verified: (1) GET /api/notifications/quantum-coherence returns coherence_score (0-100), state (Quantum Coherence/Partial Alignment/Decoherence/Zero-Point), phase (coherent/aligning/decoherent/zeropoint), breakdown (variety/frequency/streak_bonus), and signals (mood_logs/journal_entries/meditations/breathwork/streak). (2) GET /api/ai-visuals/quantum-principles now returns 5 meditations: Superposition Stillness, Quantum Entanglement, Quantum Tunneling, Wave-Particle Duality, Observer Effect Awakening. (3) POST /api/notifications/preferences accepts reminder_hour and evening_hour fields. (4) POST /api/notifications/send-scheduled accepts slot (morning/evening) and returns users_targeted and notifications_sent - does NOT require auth (for internal scheduler). (5) Dashboard shows Quantum Coherence Widget with data-testid='quantum-coherence-widget', score ring (SVG), state label, description, and breakdown badges (Moods, Journal, Meditate, Breathe, Streak). (6) VR page shows 'Quantum Field' portal in bottom navigation that opens quantum picker with 5 meditations. (7) Meditation page shows quantum descriptions like 'quantum body scan', 'quantum entanglement', 'quantum observer'. (8) Breathing page shows quantum descriptions like 'wave-particle coherence', 'quantum decoherence release', 'quantum tunneling through limits'. (9) Teachings page shows 'quantum-conscious masters' in subtitle.

backend_api.Meditation names verified: PASS - Superposition Stillness, Quantum Entanglement, Quantum Tunneling, Wave-Particle Duality, Observer Effect Awakening

frontend_dashboard.Breakdown badges visible: PASS - Moods, Journal, Meditate, Breathe, Streak

frontend_notification_settings.Morning/Evening time pickers: INFO - Only visible when notifications enabled (requires browser permission)

frontend_quantum_language.Meditation page quantum terms: PASS - quantum, wave, particle, coherence, superposition, observer
